title: pedicularis interrupta subsp. tarbagataica
intro: Pedicularis interrupta subsp. tarbagataica, also known as a type of flowering plant in the bumblebee flower family, is a subspecies of Pedicularis interrupta. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pedicularis interrupta subsp. tarbagataica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
